text:
Market today: Tech is still the main driver, but headlines about consumer spending and oil costs are creating some noise. AI's dominance is a constant theme.

Your holdings: SOXL (-34.95%) and SPAL (-37.57%) are the big red flags due to their leveraged nature and current losses. CRWD (14.96%) is your main winner.

Watch: Keep an eye on AVGO and NVDU from the scanner - they're showing strong technicals and could be opportunities if the market holds.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions and watch for any signs of broader market weakness.
plays: Trim SOXL if it breaks below its current price.
Consider trimming SPAL if it shows further weakness.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
